# J Scott Chapman
> AI product consultant specializing in healthcare tech, AI strategy, and data-driven systems.

## About
- [Homepage](https://jscottchapman.com/): AI product consultant portfolio with case studies in healthcare tech, AI, and automation

## Key Facts
- Founder of Ravenview Services (2016-present)
- 10+ years building full-stack web applications
- Specializes in HIPAA-compliant healthcare platforms and medical device integrations
- Four AWS AI/ML certifications (2025)
- Built platforms serving major pharmaceutical clients
- Conference speaker at Big Sky Dev Con and Carolina Code Conference

## Notable Work
- TechFix SMS: Automated engagement platform that doubled student engagement (2x improvement, 98%+ delivery rate)
- Morphose: HIPAA-compliant 3D physical therapy platform with 850+ exercise animations
- CGM Visualization: Clinical dashboard for continuous glucose monitor data (BLE device-to-cloud pipeline)
